rulings.Case Title: FURU "LISA" OUYANG ET AL VS. YUCHAN CHEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 17, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT SHAOSHAN WANG's AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to shift it's burden. No competent admissible evidence provided that written notice of entitlement to the relocation payment was given to the landlord. The Court notes that all the documents provided in support of the motion are attached directly to the points and authorities. The sole declaration filed in support of this motion is by Shaoshan Wang who addresses only medical records attached in Exhibit B and does not state that she provided the claim of entitlement or the records to the landlord.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 17, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT ABDALLA JOSEPH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)
